description_long: This is a hand tool with a contoured handle made of black plastic and yellow rubberized grip inserts, designed for ergonomic comfort and slip resistance. The handle features a red end cap and a visible brand marking, 'STANLEY', on one side. The shaft is metallic, slender, and extends from the handle to a pointed tip, which appears to be a Phillips head. The tool is compact and lightweight, suitable for manual fastening or loosening of screws in various urban settings such as garages, workshops, or maintenance areas. The surface of the handle is grippy and matte, while the metal shaft is smooth and reflective. There are no visible signs of wear or damage, and the tool appears to be in pristine condition.
description: A contoured, black and yellow rubberized handle screwdriver with a metallic Phillips tip and a visible 'STANLEY' brand marking. The tool is compact, ergonomic, and in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the screwdriver, highlighting the contoured handle and metallic shaft.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the pointed Phillips tip and the circular end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the 'STANLEY' brand marking and the ergonomic handle shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the red end cap and the rounded back of the handle.
